method_cn: v6.3 branch-aware 淘汰赛pipeline：赛前证据与专家委员会生成跨阶段机制，MAS rollout同时给出90分钟、若平进入加时、若仍平进入点球的条件路径，Monte Carlo在完整路径树上采样。
architecture_cn: 加时和点球不再是独立后处理输出；它们由同一条MAS条件rollout驱动，前端三Tab只是同一完整路径分布的不同切片，JSON结构保持v6.2.2兼容。

full_path_tail.rationale_cn: 90分钟和加时均未分胜负，比赛被压缩为点球随机性与门将/心理优势。
full_path_tail.rationale_en: After no separation in 90 minutes or extra time, the match is compressed into penalty randomness plus goalkeeper and psychological edges.

representative_paths.summary_en: After a 1-1 draw in 90 minutes, extra time adds 0-1; Croatia advances in extra time.

full_path_tail.rationale_cn: 90分钟打平后，体能、替补深度和风险偏好在加时阶段放大，形成分胜负路径。
full_path_tail.rationale_en: After a 90-minute draw, fatigue, bench depth and risk preference become amplified in extra time and create separation paths.

full_path_tail.rationale_en: The underdog could advance through a regular-time steal, an extra-time counterattack or penalty randomness.

normal_time.title: 常规时间（90分钟）
normal_time.condition_cn: 完整比赛的90分钟主预测，不含加时和点球。

selected_scores.rationale_cn: 抢断后的快速转换；比赛进入开放往返，双方进攻均有兑现。
selected_scores.rationale_en: Fast transitions after ball recoveries; the match turns into an open exchange, with both attacks finding a payoff.

selected_scores.rationale_cn: 若下半场降雨，比赛后段更依赖定位球、二点球和纪律控制、葡萄牙常规时间主动破局；70分钟仍平时克罗地亚更愿意拖长；葡萄牙打破对方防守后扩大领先优势。
selected_scores.rationale_en: If second-half rain arrives, the later phase becomes more dependent on set pieces, second balls and discipline; Portugal tries to settle it in regular time, while Croatia is more willing to extend the match if it remains level around 70 minutes; Portugal can then break the defense and extend the lead.

selected_scores.rationale_cn: 比赛被拉入高风险开放节奏，防线身后空间持续放大。
selected_scores.rationale_en: The game is pulled into a high-risk open rhythm, with space behind the defensive lines continuing to grow.

selected_scores.rationale_cn: 抢断后的快速转换；克罗地亚充分兑现反击或进攻效率并扩大优势。
selected_scores.rationale_en: Fast transitions after ball recoveries; Croatia fully converts counterattacking or attacking efficiency and extends the advantage.

selected_scores.rationale_cn: 点球分支不是单边优势：双门将强，葡萄牙主罚深度略有加分、抢断后的快速转换；比赛被拉入高风险开放节奏，防线身后空间持续放大。
selected_scores.rationale_en: The penalty branch is not one-sided: both goalkeepers are strong, Portugal's taker depth adds a slight edge, and fast transitions after recoveries can pull the match into a high-risk open rhythm with growing space behind the back lines.

tail_focus.rationale_cn: 比赛被拉入更开放节奏，转换、定位球或领先后空间放大，总进球显著高于主预测低比分重心。
tail_focus.rationale_en: The game shifts into a more open rhythm; transitions, set pieces or space after one side leads push total goals well above the low-score center of the main forecast.

selected_scores.rationale_cn: 葡萄牙打破对方防守后扩大领先优势。
selected_scores.rationale_en: Portugal breaks down the opposing defense and extends the lead.

selected_scores.rationale_cn: 比赛被拉入高风险开放节奏，防线身后空间持续放大。
selected_scores.rationale_en: The game is pulled into a high-risk open rhythm, with space behind the defensive lines continuing to grow.

selected_scores.rationale_cn: 葡萄牙常规时间主动破局；70分钟仍平时克罗地亚更愿意拖长；葡萄牙打破对方防守后扩大领先优势。
selected_scores.rationale_en: Portugal takes the initiative to break through in regular time; if it is still level around 70 minutes, Croatia is more willing to extend the match; Portugal then breaks down the defense and extends the lead.

selected_scores.rationale_cn: 抢断后的快速转换、点球分支不是单边优势：双门将强，葡萄牙主罚深度略有加分；克罗地亚充分兑现反击或进攻效率并扩大优势。
selected_scores.rationale_en: Evidence-based explanation generated from the match forecast.

selected_scores.rationale_cn: 若下半场降雨，比赛后段更依赖定位球、二点球和纪律控制、葡萄牙常规时间主动破局；70分钟仍平时克罗地亚更愿意拖长；比赛被拉入高风险开放节奏，防线身后空间持续放大。
selected_scores.rationale_en: If second-half rain arrives, the later phase becomes more dependent on set pieces, second balls and discipline; Portugal tries to settle it in regular time, while Croatia is more willing to extend the match if it remains level around 70 minutes; the game can be pulled into a high-risk open rhythm with growing space behind the back lines.

tail_focus.rationale_cn: 早段进球、红黄牌压力、体能或防线失衡导致比赛失去均衡，一方在90分钟内明显拉开。
tail_focus.definition_en: Either side wins by at least three goals.
tail_focus.rationale_en: An early goal, card pressure, fatigue or defensive imbalance breaks the match open, allowing one side to pull clearly away within 90 minutes.

tail_focus.label_cn: 爆冷 / 非热门方取胜
tail_focus.definition_cn: 赛前或主预测中相对不被看好的一方在90分钟获胜。

selected_scores.rationale_cn: 克罗地亚通过压迫或转换取得一球优势。
selected_scores.rationale_en: Croatia gains a one-goal edge through pressing or transition.

selected_scores.rationale_cn: 克罗地亚通过压迫或转换取得一球优势。
selected_scores.rationale_en: Croatia gains a one-goal edge through pressing or transition.

selected_scores.rationale_cn: 克罗地亚充分兑现反击或进攻效率并扩大优势。
selected_scores.rationale_en: Croatia fully converts counterattacking or attacking efficiency and extends the advantage.

selected_scores.rationale_cn: 抢断后的快速转换；克罗地亚充分兑现反击或进攻效率并扩大优势。
selected_scores.rationale_en: Fast transitions after ball recoveries; Croatia fully converts counterattacking or attacking efficiency and extends the advantage.

selected_scores.rationale_cn: 点球分支不是单边优势：双门将强，葡萄牙主罚深度略有加分、抢断后的快速转换；比赛被拉入高风险开放节奏，防线身后空间持续放大。
selected_scores.rationale_en: The penalty branch is not one-sided: both goalkeepers are strong, Portugal's taker depth adds a slight edge, and fast transitions after recoveries can pull the match into a high-risk open rhythm with growing space behind the back lines.

tail_focus.rationale_cn: 非热门方通过低位韧性、反击效率、定位球或热门方关键失误，在90分钟直接改变胜负方向。
tail_focus.definition_en: The less-favored side before the match or in the main forecast wins within 90 minutes.
tail_focus.rationale_en: The underdog changes the result within 90 minutes through low-block resilience, counterattacking efficiency, set pieces or a major favorite-side mistake.

key_factors.label_cn: 葡萄牙宽度与中路创造
key_factors.impact_cn: 葡萄牙的4-3-3/4-2-3-1结构提供边路宽度和中路创造；若边路能持续制造1v1或2v1，克罗地亚防线会被横向拉扯。
key_factors.impact_en: Portugal's 4-3-3 or 4-2-3-1 structure gives them width and central creation; if wide players keep creating 1v1s or 2v1s, Croatia's defense can be stretched horizontally.
key_factors.text_cn: 葡萄牙的4-3-3/4-2-3-1结构提供边路宽度和中路创造；若边路能持续制造1v1或2v1，克罗地亚防线会被横向拉扯。
key_factors.text_en: Portugal's 4-3-3 or 4-2-3-1 structure gives them width and central creation; if wide players keep creating 1v1s or 2v1s, Croatia's defense can be stretched horizontally.

key_factors.impact_cn: 克罗地亚的比赛管理和中场经验会压低早段开放程度；若比赛70分钟仍平，他们更有能力把节奏拖向加时或点球。
key_factors.impact_en: Croatia's game management and midfield experience can keep the opening phase controlled; if the match is still level around 70 minutes, they are well suited to drag it toward extra time or penalties.
key_factors.text_cn: 克罗地亚的比赛管理和中场经验会压低早段开放程度；若比赛70分钟仍平，他们更有能力把节奏拖向加时或点球。
key_factors.text_en: Croatia's game management and midfield experience can keep the opening phase controlled; if the match is still level around 70 minutes, they are well suited to drag it toward extra time or penalties.

key_factors.label_cn: 葡萄牙替补与后程冲击
key_factors.impact_cn: 葡萄牙赛前有较广泛轮换和出场时间分配，若前段不急于高强度冲刺，后程替补和边路冲击会成为破局资源。
key_factors.impact_en: Portugal have evidence of broad rotation and minutes management; if they avoid all-out early intensity, late substitutes and wide pressure become their main resources to break the match open.
key_factors.text_cn: 葡萄牙赛前有较广泛轮换和出场时间分配，若前段不急于高强度冲刺，后程替补和边路冲击会成为破局资源。
key_factors.text_en: Portugal have evidence of broad rotation and minutes management; if they avoid all-out early intensity, late substitutes and wide pressure become their main resources to break the match open.

key_factors.impact_cn: 若下半场出现降雨，比赛后段会更依赖定位球、二点球和纪律控制，也会提高大比分和偷袭分支的不确定性。
key_factors.impact_en: If rain arrives in the second half, the late phase becomes more dependent on set pieces, second balls and discipline, increasing uncertainty in both high-score and steal branches.
key_factors.text_cn: 若下半场出现降雨，比赛后段会更依赖定位球、二点球和纪律控制，也会提高大比分和偷袭分支的不确定性。
key_factors.text_en: If rain arrives in the second half, the late phase becomes more dependent on set pieces, second balls and discipline, increasing uncertainty in both high-score and steal branches.

key_factors.impact_cn: 葡萄牙门将有关键扑点证据，但克罗地亚也有淘汰赛和点球经验；双方都知道后程存在点球兜底，开局风险偏好不会自动升高。
key_factors.impact_en: Portugal's goalkeeper has key penalty-save evidence, but Croatia also carry knockout and shootout experience; both sides know penalties are a credible fallback, so opening risk appetite should not rise automatically.
key_factors.text_cn: 葡萄牙门将有关键扑点证据，但克罗地亚也有淘汰赛和点球经验；双方都知道后程存在点球兜底，开局风险偏好不会自动升高。
key_factors.text_en: Portugal's goalkeeper has key penalty-save evidence, but Croatia also carry knockout and shootout experience; both sides know penalties are a credible fallback, so opening risk appetite should not rise automatically.

key_factors.label_cn: 老将压力与淘汰赛情绪
key_factors.impact_cn: C罗与莫德里奇的世界杯叙事会放大情绪和压力变量，但模型仍把核心机制放在中场控制、转换效率和后程执行上。
key_factors.impact_en: The Ronaldo-Modrić World Cup storyline amplifies emotion and pressure, but the model still anchors the match in midfield control, transition efficiency and late-game execution.
key_factors.text_cn: C罗与莫德里奇的世界杯叙事会放大情绪和压力变量，但模型仍把核心机制放在中场控制、转换效率和后程执行上。
key_factors.text_en: The Ronaldo-Modrić World Cup storyline amplifies emotion and pressure, but the model still anchors the match in midfield control, transition efficiency and late-game execution.

normal_time.condition_en: The main 90-minute prediction for the match, excluding extra time and penalties.

extra_time.title: 加时赛（如进入）
extra_time.condition_cn: 条件：90分钟常规时间打平；输入包括完整90分钟预测、平局比分分布、淘汰赛证据、常规时间Tail与MAS结论。

tail_focus.label: 加时偷袭 / 一球决胜
tail_focus.label_cn: 加时偷袭 / 一球决胜
tail_focus.definition_cn: 加时30分钟内通过反击、定位球或替补冲击形成1球胜负。
tail_focus.rationale_cn: 葡萄牙凭借体能、替补或压迫优势在加时净胜一球。
tail_focus.definition_en: A one-goal extra-time decider created through counters, set pieces or substitute impact.
tail_focus.rationale_en: Evidence-based explanation generated from the match forecast.

tail_focus.label: 加时开放 / 双方进球
tail_focus.label_cn: 加时开放 / 双方进球
tail_focus.definition_cn: 加时阶段双方均有进球，比赛从谨慎拖入开放对攻。
tail_focus.rationale_cn: 加时阶段比赛打开，双方各有一次有效转化。
tail_focus.label_en: Open extra time / both teams score
tail_focus.definition_en: Both sides score in extra time as a cautious game turns into an open exchange.
tail_focus.rationale_en: The game opens up in extra time, with both sides converting one effective chance.

tail_focus.label: 体能崩盘 / 加时打穿
tail_focus.label_cn: 体能崩盘 / 加时打穿
tail_focus.definition_cn: 加时净胜至少2球，或总进球达到3球以上的一方打穿路径。
tail_focus.rationale_cn: 葡萄牙在对手体能或心理崩盘后拉开比分。
tail_focus.definition_en: A team wins extra time by at least two goals, or the period reaches three or more goals through a breakaway path.
tail_focus.rationale_en: Evidence-based explanation generated from the match forecast.

key_factors.impact_cn: 葡萄牙对克罗地亚的平局入口较高，1-1和0-0是主要加时来源；加时不会重新打开为完全独立比赛。
key_factors.label_en: Extra time comes from 1-1 and 0-0 branches
key_factors.impact_en: Portugal-Croatia has a relatively high draw entry, with 1-1 and 0-0 as the main paths into extra time; the period should not be treated as a standalone match.
key_factors.text_cn: 葡萄牙对克罗地亚的平局入口较高，1-1和0-0是主要加时来源；加时不会重新打开为完全独立比赛。
key_factors.text_en: Portugal-Croatia has a relatively high draw entry, with 1-1 and 0-0 as the main paths into extra time; the period should not be treated as a standalone match.

key_factors.impact_cn: 葡萄牙的Vitinha、João Neves、Bruno Fernandes与克罗地亚的Modrić、Baturina、Sučić之间的中场对抗，会决定加时是否继续低节奏。
key_factors.impact_en: The midfield battle between Portugal's Vitinha, João Neves and Bruno Fernandes and Croatia's Modrić, Baturina and Sučić will decide whether extra time remains low-tempo.
key_factors.text_cn: 葡萄牙的Vitinha、João Neves、Bruno Fernandes与克罗地亚的Modrić、Baturina、Sučić之间的中场对抗，会决定加时是否继续低节奏。
key_factors.text_en: The midfield battle between Portugal's Vitinha, João Neves and Bruno Fernandes and Croatia's Modrić, Baturina and Sučić will decide whether extra time remains low-tempo.

key_factors.label_cn: 葡萄牙边路与禁区接应
key_factors.impact_cn: 若葡萄牙边路持续形成1v1或2v1，并让禁区内有多点接应，加时阶段更可能出现1-0或2-0解决路径。
key_factors.impact_en: If Portugal keep creating wide 1v1 or 2v1 situations with multiple box targets, extra time is more likely to produce a 1-0 or 2-0 Portugal path.
key_factors.text_cn: 若葡萄牙边路持续形成1v1或2v1，并让禁区内有多点接应，加时阶段更可能出现1-0或2-0解决路径。
key_factors.text_en: If Portugal keep creating wide 1v1 or 2v1 situations with multiple box targets, extra time is more likely to produce a 1-0 or 2-0 Portugal path.

key_factors.label_cn: 克罗地亚拖长比赛能力
key_factors.impact_cn: 克罗地亚更有经验把比赛拖入低节奏、少失误的结构中；若70分钟后仍平，加时拖入点球的权重会上升。
key_factors.label_en: Croatia's ability to extend the match
key_factors.impact_en: Croatia have the experience to slow the game into a low-error structure; if it remains level late, the weight of a penalty-drag path increases.
key_factors.text_cn: 克罗地亚更有经验把比赛拖入低节奏、少失误的结构中；若70分钟后仍平，加时拖入点球的权重会上升。
key_factors.text_en: Croatia have the experience to slow the game into a low-error structure; if it remains level late, the weight of a penalty-drag path increases.

key_factors.label_cn: 晚场天气与定位球变量
key_factors.impact_cn: 多伦多晚场若出现降雨，后段会更依赖定位球、二点球和纪律控制，开放比分与偷袭分支都会被放大。
key_factors.impact_en: If rain affects the late Toronto game, set pieces, second balls and discipline become more important, increasing both open-score and steal branches.
key_factors.text_cn: 多伦多晚场若出现降雨，后段会更依赖定位球、二点球和纪律控制，开放比分与偷袭分支都会被放大。
key_factors.text_en: If rain affects the late Toronto game, set pieces, second balls and discipline become more important, increasing both open-score and steal branches.

extra_time.workflow_cn: 加时专属流程：证据整合 → 4个专家Agent → 专家委员会聚合 → 条件Rollout → 条件蒙特卡洛矩阵 → 加时Tail审计 → 报告输出。
extra_time.condition_en: Condition: the match is level after 90 minutes; inputs include the full 90-minute prediction, draw score distribution, knockout evidence, normal-time tail scenarios and MAS conclusions.
extra_time.workflow_en: Extra-time workflow: evidence integration → four expert agents → committee aggregation → conditional rollout → conditional Monte Carlo matrix → extra-time tail audit → report output.

penalties.title: 点球大战（如进入）
penalties.condition_cn: 条件：90分钟打平且加时仍平。输入包括90分钟预测、加时Mini-Pipeline结果、点球证据、门将/主罚手/压力因素。

tail_focus.label: 门将连续扑点
tail_focus.definition_cn: 一方门将连续扑点或对手连续罚丢，点球比分被迅速拉开。

selected_scores.rationale_cn: 门将连续扑点改变胜负。
selected_scores.rationale_en: Goalkeeper heroics or repeated saves swing the shootout.

selected_scores.rationale_cn: 门将连续扑点改变胜负。
selected_scores.rationale_en: Goalkeeper heroics or repeated saves swing the shootout.

tail_focus.rationale_cn: 门将连续扑点改变胜负。
tail_focus.definition_en: One goalkeeper makes repeated saves, or the opponent misses several penalties, causing the shootout score to widen quickly.
tail_focus.rationale_en: Goalkeeper heroics or repeated saves swing the shootout.

tail_focus.label: 热门方压力失误
tail_focus.definition_cn: 更被看好的一方在关键轮次罚丢，非热门方点球晋级。

selected_scores.rationale_cn: 热门球队压力下核心罚手失误。
selected_scores.rationale_en: A key taker for the favored team misses under pressure.

tail_focus.rationale_cn: 热门球队压力下核心罚手失误。
tail_focus.definition_en: The favored side misses in a key round and the underdog advances on penalties.
tail_focus.rationale_en: A key taker for the favored team misses under pressure.

tail_focus.label: 延长点球决胜
tail_focus.definition_cn: 双方前五轮质量较高，进入6+轮突然死亡后才分胜负。

selected_scores.rationale_cn: 双方前五轮质量较高，进入延长点球。
selected_scores.rationale_en: Both sides perform well across the first five rounds, pushing the shootout into sudden death.

tail_focus.rationale_cn: 双方前五轮质量较高，进入延长点球。
tail_focus.definition_en: Both sides convert well through the first five rounds and the shootout is decided only after six or more rounds.
tail_focus.rationale_en: Both sides perform well across the first five rounds, pushing the shootout into sudden death.

key_factors.impact_cn: 点球条件下葡萄牙约50.9%、克罗地亚约49.1%，差距极小，胜负更多取决于临场执行。
key_factors.impact_en: In the penalty branch Portugal are around 50.9% and Croatia around 49.1%, so the result depends mainly on execution.
key_factors.text_cn: 点球条件下葡萄牙约50.9%、克罗地亚约49.1%，差距极小，胜负更多取决于临场执行。
key_factors.text_en: In the penalty branch Portugal are around 50.9% and Croatia around 49.1%, so the result depends mainly on execution.

key_factors.impact_cn: 葡萄牙门将有关键扑点证据，克罗地亚门将与球队也有淘汰赛点球经验；门将因素不构成单边优势。
key_factors.impact_en: Portugal's goalkeeper has key penalty-save evidence, while Croatia also bring goalkeeper and tournament shootout experience; this is not a one-sided goalkeeper edge.
key_factors.text_cn: 葡萄牙门将有关键扑点证据，克罗地亚门将与球队也有淘汰赛点球经验；门将因素不构成单边优势。
key_factors.text_en: Portugal's goalkeeper has key penalty-save evidence, while Croatia also bring goalkeeper and tournament shootout experience; this is not a one-sided goalkeeper edge.

key_factors.label_cn: 主罚手深度与老将经验
key_factors.impact_cn: 葡萄牙主罚深度略有加分，但克罗地亚的老将经验和比赛管理能力会抵消部分优势。
key_factors.impact_en: Portugal's taker depth adds a slight edge, but Croatia's veteran experience and game management offset part of it.
key_factors.text_cn: 葡萄牙主罚深度略有加分，但克罗地亚的老将经验和比赛管理能力会抵消部分优势。
key_factors.text_en: Portugal's taker depth adds a slight edge, but Croatia's veteran experience and game management offset part of it.

key_factors.label_cn: C罗与莫德里奇的压力背景
key_factors.impact_cn: 两队核心老将都承受强烈淘汰赛压力，关键轮次失误可能直接改变胜负。
key_factors.impact_en: Both teams' veteran stars carry heavy knockout pressure, and one key-round miss could swing the shootout.
key_factors.text_cn: 两队核心老将都承受强烈淘汰赛压力，关键轮次失误可能直接改变胜负。
key_factors.text_en: Both teams' veteran stars carry heavy knockout pressure, and one key-round miss could swing the shootout.

key_factors.impact_cn: 双方前五轮质量若较高，比赛可能进入6轮以后突然死亡，模型因此保留多组4-5、5-4、6-5等比分族。
key_factors.impact_en: If both sides convert well through the first five rounds, the shootout may move into sudden death, so the model retains score families such as 4-5, 5-4 and 6-5.
key_factors.text_cn: 双方前五轮质量若较高，比赛可能进入6轮以后突然死亡，模型因此保留多组4-5、5-4、6-5等比分族。
key_factors.text_en: If both sides convert well through the first five rounds, the shootout may move into sudden death, so the model retains score families such as 4-5, 5-4 and 6-5.

penalties.workflow_cn: 点球专属流程：证据整合 → 4个专家Agent → 专家委员会聚合 → 点球序列Rollout → 点球比分矩阵 → 点球Tail审计 → 报告输出。
penalties.condition_en: Condition: the match is level after 90 minutes and remains level after extra time; inputs include the 90-minute prediction, extra-time mini-pipeline results, penalty evidence, goalkeepers, takers and pressure factors.
penalties.workflow_en: Penalty workflow: evidence integration → four expert agents → committee aggregation → penalty-sequence rollout → penalty score matrix → penalty tail audit → report output.

method_en: The v6.3 branch-aware knockout pipeline uses pre-match evidence and the expert committee to build cross-stage mechanisms; MAS rollouts generate conditional paths for 90 minutes, extra time if level, and penalties if still level, while Monte Carlo samples the complete path tree.
architecture_en: Extra time and penalties are no longer independent post-processing outputs; they are driven by the same MAS conditional rollout, and the three frontend tabs are slices of one complete path distribution while keeping the JSON structure compatible with v6.2.2.
